introduce/quick_start/index.po.在主页点击 :ui-btn:`工作列表` 进入 :ui-tab:`数据分析报告`: On the Home page, click :ui-btn:`Work List` to open the :ui-tab:`Data Analysis Report`. The page has three tabs — :ui-tab:`Summary`, :ui-tab:`Inspection Result`, :ui-tab:`Component` — and can be filtered by time range, PCBA, serial number, machine, operator, and more.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.切换到 :ui-tab:`检测结果`，可查看每次检测记录：PCBA 名称、主序列: Switch to :ui-tab:`Inspection Result` to see each inspection record: PCBA name, Main SN, NG component count, false alarm count, review result, operator, machine, start/end time, etc. Click :ui-btn:`View` on a record to open the review detail.
